include_expired.description: Include expired `agent_inference` entries (default false). Use for audit/debug only.

limit.description: Max rows to return (default 20, hard cap 100).

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

tags.description: Tags filtered via Postgres array overlap. Pass repeated `tags=` query params to filter.

text.description: ILIKE substring match against `content`. Omit to return the most recent entries.
